title: Find Devices

subtitle.ios: Scanning for desktop apps on your local network...
subtitle.android: Scanning for desktop apps on your local network. If no device is found, enter the IPv4 address manually.

emptyState.android: No devices found. Enter the IP address manually to continue pairing.

troubleshooting.title: Can't find a device or not sure how to connect?
troubleshooting.sameWifi: Make sure your phone and computer are connected to the same Wi-Fi or local network.
troubleshooting.desktopApp: Open {{host}} in your computer browser, follow the OSS desktop build or release instructions, and keep the desktop app open.
troubleshooting.notReadyDesc: Build or install Lynavo Drive desktop from the OSS repository first, then return to scan QR or enter code.

unconnected.title: Start using Lynavo Drive
unconnected.subtitle: Sync media wirelessly from phone to computer in three steps.

downloadStep.title: Install PC App
downloadStep.body: Install Lynavo Drive on your computer

connectStep.title: Connect Phone
connectStep.body: Enter a pairing code or scan QR

unconnected.copyFailed: Could not copy the download address. Please try again later.
unconnected.copyHint: Open this address in your computer browser to download
unconnected.footerNote: First-time guide - Available again from Help

onboarding.step1Desc: Select a computer to connect. The guide only previews features without creating real data.
onboarding.step2Desc: Once connected, foreground auto upload syncs new photos and videos over the local LAN.
onboarding.step3Desc: Choose albums, files, and scope to control what gets synced.
onboarding.step4Desc: Shows upload progress, last sync time, and sync errors once active.
onboarding.step5Desc: Files downloaded from computer and sync history are shown here.
onboarding.step6Desc: Browse computer files and sync space, retrieve files quickly.

openLinkFailed.title: Cannot Open
openLinkFailed.body: Could not open {{label}} right now. Please try again later.

manualInput.title: Enter IP to Pair
manualInput.description: If the scan can't find your computer — especially Windows — enter the desktop app's IPv4 address directly.
manualInput.guideTitle: Where do I find the code and IP?
manualInput.guideBody: Open Lynavo Drive on your computer, choose Global Settings from the sidebar, then check the 6-digit code, device IP, or QR code.
manualInput.hint: Uses sync port 39593 by default. You'll still need to enter the 6-digit pairing code in the next step.
manualInput.ipError: Please enter a valid IPv4 address, e.g. 192.168.0.1

connectionMethod.title: Select Connection Method
connectionMethod.connectCodeDesc: Enter the pairing code shown on {{name}} to complete connection.

connectionCodeWrongWithAttempts: Incorrect connection code. You can try {{remainingAttempts}} more times.
connectionCodeWrong: Incorrect connection code. Please enter the 6-digit code shown on the computer.
pairingBlockedDesc: This computer has blocked this phone from pairing. Please unblock it on the computer first.
versionIncompatibleDesc: App versions are incompatible. Please update Lynavo Drive on both devices.
connectionFailedDesc: Connection failed. Please check if the computer is online and try again.
pairingInvalidatedDesc: This desktop changed its pairing code. Pair again to continue.
noDeviceDesc: No computers found on this local network. Make sure the desktop app is open and on the same Wi-Fi.
nearbyPermissionDesc: Android requires permission to find nearby devices to discover computers.
connectTimeoutDesc: The computer took too long to respond. It might be in use or offline.
cameraDeniedDesc: Cannot open camera. You can use the 6-digit pairing code instead.
scanFirstText: Scan local network computers first, then scan QR code or enter pairing code.
manualPairingDesc: Select QR pairing, or enter computer IP and pairing code.
enterIPAndCode: Enter computer IP and pairing code
manualIPHint: Enter the IP address shown on the computer to connect.
manualIPErr: Please enter a valid IP address or hostname.
viewSettingsHint: Check computer settings for IP and 6-digit connection code.
cameraDeniedModalDesc: Scan QR code requires camera permission to scan the computer's screen.
enterCodeDesc: Enter the connection code shown on {{deviceName}} to complete pairing.
cameraAccessDesc: Scanning QR code requires camera access to read the QR code on the computer screen.

preview.syncPlanDesc: Albums and files will sync to your computer.
preview.syncSpaceDesc: View files synced to computer and upload sources
preview.localComputerDesc: Browse computer shared folders and download files
